headline: Lockheed Martin Expands Counter Drone And F 16 Viper Upgrade Pipeline
summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) has partnered with Fortem Technologies to deploy autonomous counter drone systems to protect critical airspace and infrastructure. The company is also set to upgrade 38 Greek F 16 fighter jets to the advanced Viper configuration as global interest in F 16 platforms continues. Both agreements add fresh context to Lockheed Martin’s current business mix beyond previously discussed programs and legal matters. Lockheed Martin’s latest contracts arrive with the share...
